---
title: "Optimization"
---

## Goal

Optimization updates parameters to reduce loss over training data.

## Gradient descent

A standard update rule is:

$$
\theta_{t+1} = \theta_t - \eta \nabla_\theta L(\theta_t)
$$

where $\eta$ is the learning rate.

## Practical notes

- Too large a learning rate can diverge.
- Too small a learning rate can stall progress.
- Batch-based updates improve computational efficiency.

## Summary

Optimization operationalizes learning by turning objectives into parameter updates.
